easy.title: Convert Flat CSS to SCSS with Nesting and Variables
easy.description: Convert a flat CSS file into SCSS by extracting repeated colors and font sizes as variables, and nesting child selectors under their parent using the & parent selector. The goal is to eliminate duplication and make the CSS more maintainable using SCSS features.

medium.title: Create a Responsive Breakpoint Mixin
medium.description: Create a reusable SCSS mixin called respond-to that handles media queries. The mixin should accept a breakpoint value and use @content to inject the styles. Then use that mixin to build a responsive grid layout that goes from single-column on mobile to three columns on desktop.

hard.title: Build a Theme Utility Generator with SCSS Maps and Loops
hard.description: Create a SCSS map of theme colors, then use @each to automatically generate text color and background color utility classes. Then extend this to generate responsive variants (md:, lg:) for these utilities using nested @each and @include with a breakpoint mixin. The output should produce .text-primary, .bg-primary, .md\:text-primary, etc.
